Meath Bowling Club

Lawn bowls for the local community

About the club

Our story, values, and community

Meath Bowling Club is a welcoming community for local bowlers and visitors. We support friendly competitions, coaching, and social gatherings for all ages.

Our mission

To grow the sport of lawn bowls in Meath by creating an inclusive club where members can learn, play, and connect with the local community.

  • Local coaching for new members
  • Friendly matches and events
  • Community-led club management

Why join

Members receive access to club news, documents, member-only events, and a supportive group of bowlers.

Club coaching

Skills sessions for beginners and experienced bowlers.

Social events

Regular social gatherings and match days.

Club support

A friendly committee dedicated to maintaining the club.

Meet the club

Our committee and members work together to plan events, maintain the green, and welcome visitors.

Meath Bowling Club

Friendly, community-first lawn bowls in Meath. Everyone is welcome, whether you're new or returning.
